title: rothmannia keithii
intro: Rothmannia keithii is a tropical plant species that belongs to the Rubiaceae family, commonly known as a flowering plant native to Sri Lanka. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rothmannia keithii include its potential to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and support wound healing. The herbal preparations of Rothmannia keithii include teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used in traditional medicine to address various health concerns.
